chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Applications 61 & 60 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 12 & 26 2. For orders on CMA No.830/2021 3. For hearing of main case 15.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Pursuant to order dated 08.10.2025, learned counsel under instructions states that these reference applications may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
